form.formComment: Most recently made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 7 at Antalya on April 7 over 2000m, 0.7 len behind Takeover with 60.5kg at $3.20. The race before that second last of 9 at Antalya on March 26 over 2000m, 17 len behind Sheep Stealer with 58kg at $2.55. Knocking on the door.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently 3rd in a small field at Osmangazi All Weather on March 30 over 1300m, 3.5 len behind Lion Tomo carrying 55kg at $10.60.
